ksa_text: Skill in designing and implementing CI/CD pipelines for ML models, including automated testing at unit, integration, and model quality levels, artifact versioning, and deployment automation with rollback capability.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-S-015 (AI and Machine Learning/Skill) scores 0.407 composite (highest: O*NET at 0.407) and is in_scope for the Data Engineer role. The KSA aligns with AI and Machine Learning competencies expected of a Data Engineer at IC-to-senior IC level. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior IC data engineering.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: Include for edge domain (AI and Machine Learning) at composite 0.407. Edge domain threshold is ≥0.42. Consistency check: this may fall below the applied standard.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Overturned to exclude. Edge domain inclusion requires composite ≥0.42; 0.407 is below threshold.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this AI and Machine Learning KSA (composite 0.407)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of 500+ DE job postings (2023-2025) does not surface this AI and Machine Learning competency as a standard IC/senior IC requirement. Exclusion consistent with the role's technical focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
